description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier — discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: A governance-as-code engine that turns mythological regime lenses into structured registry health audits, preserves immutable audit chronologies, and surfaces consensus candidates across multiple audits.
ranked.first_task: Stabilize engine execution paths and data contracts for non-local deployment by replacing hard-coded filesystem assumptions with configurable CLI/env inputs and publishing structured JSON output contracts.
